name: Multi-Grain & Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients except the seeds and nuts to your bread machine in the order appropriate for your machine.
2. If you have a Panasonic machine with the VARIETY Cycle, use this feature to allow you to remove the dough, work with it, then put it back without the blade before continuing to bake.
3. For other machines, set to a dough cycle and finish baking manually.
4. When using the Panasonic VARIETY Cycle, be aware that it will beep after about 2 hours and 20 minutes (and show 1:55 on the machine).
5. Remove the dough and seeds/nuts onto a floured surface. Take the dough blade out of the bucket.
6. Add the seeds, nuts, and grated carrots (if using) to the dough and work it in evenly.
7. Return the dough back to the machine's bucket and press START.
8. Alternatively, you can roll the dough out, place the ingredients on top, and then roll up the dough, tucking under the ends.
